title: Refactor procedural LiveView into LiveView + context + components
prompt: Write lib/my_app/reports.ex (module MyApp.Reports) as a context module with load_report/2 taking (org_id, date) and returning the report data — NOT taking the socket. Then write lib/my_app_web/live/reports_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ReportsLive) that calls MyApp.Reports.load_report(org_id, date) in handle_params. Also extract <.report_header user={@user} date={@date} /> and <.report_chart data={@data} /> as stateless function components defined in a helper module MyAppWeb.Components.Reports. The LiveView must not perform business logic inline — all logic lives in the context.
tier_rationale: Requires pulling business logic out of the LiveView into a context module and extracting display components. Multi-file design.
